approval_items.title: Approval Required - danger
approval_items.reason: Approval evidence contains live trading, broker, webhook, API key, real order, or secret language.
approval_items.recommended_operator_action: Leave blocked. Do not approve into execution.

stale_items.title: Approval Required - dirty repo
stale_items.reason: Approval refers to a dirty repo state, but current git status is clean.
stale_items.recommended_operator_action: Treat as historical runtime evidence; do not act on it without a fresh approval request.

unsafe_items.title: Approval Required - danger
unsafe_items.reason: Approval evidence contains live trading, broker, webhook, API key, real order, or secret language.
unsafe_items.recommended_operator_action: Leave blocked. Do not approve into execution.

next_safe_action: Review unsafe and waiting approval items before any APPLY, commit, push, merge, PR, or worker launch.

dashboard_cards.next_safe_action: Review unsafe and waiting approval items before any APPLY, commit, push, merge, PR, or worker launch.
